description: You are a Public Health/Plumbing Engineer tasked with retrofitting a sustainable water management system into the FZK-Haus IFC model in Bonsai/BlenderBIM. Following the requirements in the specification brief on the Desktop, model a rainwater harvesting system including a storage tank (IfcTank), a distribution pump (IfcPump), and at least two connecting pipe segments (IfcPipeSegment). Assign these elements to a new IfcSystem named 'Rainwater'. Save the enriched project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_rainwater_system.ifc while preserving original architectural elements.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=70. Must save file and hit most equipment/system targets.
